name: GH_EtoUtil
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.GUI.GH_EtoUtil.)

methods.name: CenterFormOnCursor
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnCursor(this Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered around the cursor

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnEditor
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnEditor(this Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the active editor. If the editor doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.

methods.name: CenterFormOnScreen
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnScreen(this Window F, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the current screen. The current screen being defined as the screen containing the cursor.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the active screen.

methods.name: CenterFormOnWindow
methods.signature: public static void CenterFormOnWindow(this Window F, Window parentWindow, bool limitToScreen)
methods.summary: Positions a Form so that it is centered on the supplied window. If the window doesn't exist or is hidden, the form will be centered on the screen instead.

params.name: limitToScreen
params.doc: If True, the Form won't be allowed to extend beyond the limits of the screen containing the cursor.
